steps.name: User click on the "Getting started" option
User should see the Collector Management page "https://virtualsme.ai/services/collector" without any console errors
User should see all the elements like "Collector Management", "Welcome to Collector Management" dropdowns, filters etc on the page
User click on the "Best Practice" option
